creator: rakuco@FreeBSD.org
text:
Sorry for not looking at this earlier, I had been somewhat away for a while. I remember looking at the release notes for 3.3.2 and there wasn't anything in particular that warranted an upgrade. I ended up going directly to 3.4.0 in bug 204629, which has just landed.

Your contribution is highly appreciated though, and please don't get discouraged by this :-)
